targets.rawSql:
SELECT entity_type, mention_text, resolution_status, resolution_confidence, resolution_method, created_at
FROM entity_mentions
WHERE needs_review = true
   OR coalesce(resolution_confidence, 0) < 0.78
ORDER BY coalesce(resolution_confidence, 0) ASC, created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT entity_type, canonical_key, display_name, confidence, review_reason, updated_at
FROM canonical_entities
WHERE needs_review = true
ORDER BY confidence ASC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT
  graph_key,
  neo4j_label_or_type,
  nullif(payload->'properties'->>'confidence', '')::numeric AS confidence,
  started_at
FROM graph_upsert_audit
WHERE upsert_type = 'relationship'
  AND nullif(payload->'properties'->>'confidence', '')::numeric < 0.78
ORDER BY confidence ASC, started_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT target_table, target_id, review_type, reason, priority, created_at
FROM human_review_queue
WHERE status = 'open'
ORDER BY priority, created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT target_table, feedback_type, decision, count(*) AS feedback_items, max(created_at) AS latest_feedback_at
FROM human_feedback
GROUP BY target_table, feedback_type, decision
ORDER BY latest_feedback_at DESC;
